recommendations.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mission Marvel
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Comedy, TV Movie, Action, Adventure, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Phineas and Ferb team up with the Avengers to save the world from Dr. Doofenshmirtz and a group of dangerous supervillains.

recommendations.title: Star Trek: Generations
recommendations.overview: Captain Jean-Luc Picard and the crew of the Enterprise-D find themselves at odds with the renegade scientist Soran who is destroying entire star systems. Only one man can help Picard stop Soran's scheme...and he's been dead for seventy-eight years.

recommendations.title: Catwoman: Hunted
recommendations.overview: Catwoman's attempt to steal a priceless jewel puts her squarely in the crosshairs of both a powerful consortium of villains and the ever-resourceful Interpol, not to mention Batwoman.

recommendations.title: Big Hero 6
recommendations.overview: A special bond develops between plus-sized inflatable robot Baymax, and prodigy Hiro Hamada, who team up with a group of friends to form a band of high-tech heroes.
